content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Amended `src/cli/project.rs` so `resolve_bead_plan()` only treats implicit title matches as authoritative when the live bead id still matches that proposal's current implicit slot. Title-only fallback now remains non-authoritative, which prevents stale reordered beads from inheriting the current `plan_hash`/`plan_version`, while still using the current implicit slot id to disambiguate duplicate implicit titles. Added deterministic regressions covering reordered implicit proposals and duplicate-title tie-breaking, and updated the existing flow-override unit to use a slot-consistent fixture.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect `resolve_bead_plan` and the plan-metadata stamping path to confirm how implicit title fallback was still setting `membership_confirmed` after reorder-sensitive backfill.
2. [Completed] Patch `resolve_bead_plan` so implicit proposals only confirm membership when the matched title also lines up with the proposal's current implicit slot id; otherwise keep the title fallback non-authoritative.
3. [Completed] Add deterministic regressions for reordered implicit proposals and duplicate implicit titles resolved by the current slot id, then run focused formatting and validation.

## Validation Evidence

- Ran `cargo fmt --all`.
- Ran `cargo test resolve_bead_plan_ -- --nocapture` and all 9 targeted bead-resolution unit tests passed.
- Ran `cargo test project_create_from_bead_ -- --nocapture` and all 16 targeted create-from-bead CLI integration tests passed.

## Outstanding Risks

- Did not run the full repository test suite beyond the targeted bead-resolution and `project create-from-bead` coverage.
- The unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` workspace directory was left untouched.
